title: Sort Colors (Dutch National Flag)
pattern: Array â€” Three-Way Partitioning (Dutch National Flag)
coreIdea: Sort an array containing only 0s, 1s, and 2s in a single pass using three pointers that partition the array into three regions (0s, 1s, 2s) without using a general sorting algorithm.
recognitionCues: array contains only a small fixed set of distinct values (e.g., 0,1,2)
single-pass O(n) in-place solution expected, ruling out counting sort with two passes
approach: Maintain low, mid, high pointers. If arr[mid]==0, swap with arr[low], increment both low and mid. If arr[mid]==1, just increment mid. If arr[mid]==2, swap with arr[high], decrement high (don't increment mid, since the swapped-in element needs to be checked).
